sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR, number FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, number, created_at) VALUES (1, '🦆', 2.5, '2023-01-01 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, number, created_at) VALUES (2, NULL, 0.0, '2023-01-02 00:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, number, created_at) VALUES (3, '', -5.75, '2023-01-03 00:00:00');
SELECT id, sha256(data) AS hashed_data, number / 2.0 AS half_number FROM test_table WHERE number / 2.0 > 0;
SELECT id, sha256(data) AS hashed_data FROM test_table WHERE number < 0 HAVING sha256(data) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sha256(data) AS hashed_data FROM test_table t1 JOIN (SELECT id, number FROM test_table WHERE number > 0) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, sha256(data) AS hashed_data FROM test_table WHERE created_at < (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM test_table) AND number / 2.0 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(number) AS avg_number FROM test_table GROUP BY sha256(data) HAVING AVG(number) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (sha256(data) / number) AS complex_calculation FROM test_table WHERE number > 0 AND sha256(data) IS NOT NULL;
WITH computed AS (SELECT id, sha256(data) AS hashed_data FROM test_table) SELECT hashed_data FROM computed WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE number = 2.5) AND hashed_data IS NOT NULL;
